entity.label: Junia
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: (Rom. 16:7), a Christian at Rome to whom Paul sends salutations along with Andronicus.

nodes.label: Junia
nodes.description: (Rom. 16:7), a Christian at Rome to whom Paul sends salutations along with Andronicus.

verses.text: Salute Andronicus and Junia, my kinsmen, and my fellowprisoners, who are of note among the apostles, who also were in Christ before me.
